# Канбан доска и проблема с перетаскиванием (2026-02-20 09:06Z)

_**User**_

ты можешь показать мне как именно работает наша канбан доска в проекте и как реализовано перетаскивание. я спрашиваю это потому что при клике по deal на канбан доске и старте перетаскивания - компонент deal сразу распалагается сбоку от курсора как будто есть offset и курсором изза этого не очень удобно целиться

---

_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user is asking about how the Kanban board works in the project and how drag-and-drop is implemented. They're experiencing an issue where when they click on a deal on the Kanban board and start dragging, the deal component is positioned to the side of the cursor as if there's an offset, making it inconvenient to aim with the cursor.

I need to:
1. Find the Kanban board implementation in the project
2. Understand how drag-and-drop is implemented
3. Identify the offset issue and potentially fix it

Let me search for the Kanban board and drag-and-drop related code.
</details></think>

        "contents": "import { Box, Paper, Typography, Chip } from '@mui/material';\nimport { useDataProvider, useNotify, useRefresh } from 'react-admin';\nimport { DealCard } from './DealCard';\n\nexport const KanbanBoard = ({ deals, stages, pipeline }) =&gt; {\n  const dataProvider = useDataProvider();\n  const notify = useNotify();\n  const refresh = useRefresh();\n  const [localDeals, setLocalDeals] = useState(deals);\n  \n  const handleDragEnd = async (result) =&gt; {\n    if (!result.destination) return;\n    \n    const { draggableId, source, destination } = result;\n    \n    if (source.droppableId === destination.droppableId) return;\n    \n    const dealId = draggableId;\n    const newStage = destination.droppableId;\n    \n    // Optimistic update\n    setLocalDeals((prev) =&gt;\n      prev.map((deal) =&gt;\n        deal.id === dealId ? { ...deal, stage: newStage } : deal\n      )\n    );\n    \n    try {\n      await dataProvider.moveDealStage(dealId, newStage);\n      notify('Deal moved successfully', { type: 'success' });\n    } catch (error) {\n      // Revert on error\n      setLocalDeals(deals);\n      notify('Failed to move deal', { type: 'error' });\n    }\n  };\n  \n  const getDealsByStage = (stageId) =&gt;\n    localDeals.filter((deal) =&gt; deal.stage === stageId);\n  \n  const getStageTotal = (stageId) =&gt;\n    getDealsByStage(stageId).reduce((sum, deal) =&gt; sum + (deal.value || 0), 0);\n  \n  return (\n    &lt;DragDropContext onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}&gt;\n      ",

          },
          {
            "text": "    // Optimistic update",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "    setLocalDeals((prev) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "      prev.map((deal) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "        deal.id === dealId ? { ...deal, stage: newStage } : deal",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "      )",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "      await dataProvider.moveDealStage(dealId, newStage);",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "      notify('Deal moved successfully', { type: 'success' });",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Revert on error",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "      setLocalDeals(deals);",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "      notify('Failed to move deal', { type: 'error' });",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "  const getDealsByStage = (stageId) =&gt;",

          },
          {
            "text": "    localDeals.filter((deal) =&gt; deal.stage === stageId);",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "  const getStageTotal = (stageId) =&gt;",

          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\frontend\\src\\components\\Kanban\\KanbanBoard.jsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 201
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 263,
            "column": 4
          }
        },
        "contents": "  const loadDeals = useCallback(async () =&gt; {\n    if (!selectedPipelineId) return;\n\n    setDealsLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    \n    try {\n      const { data } = await dataProvider.getList('deals', {\n        pagination: { page: 1, perPage: 100 },\n        sort: { field: 'created_at', order: 'DESC' },\n        filter: { pipeline_id: selectedPipelineId },\n      });\n      \n      setDeals(data || []);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Failed to load deals:', err);\n      setError(err.message || 'Failed to load deals');\n      notify('Fehler beim Laden der Deals', { type: 'error' });\n    } finally {\n      setDealsLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [selectedPipelineId, dataProvider, notify]);\n\n  // Load deals for selected pipeline\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (!selectedPipelineId) return;\n    loadDeals();\n  }, [selectedPipelineId, loadDeals]);\n\n  // Group deals by stage (memoized)\n  const dealsByStage = useMemo(() =&gt; {\n    const grouped = {};\n    stages.forEach(stage =&gt; {\n      const stageDeals = deals.filter(deal =&gt; \n        deal.stage_id === stage.id || deal.stage === stage.id || deal.stage === stage.slug\n      );\n      stageDeals.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\n        const aPos = a.position ?? Infinity;\n        const bPos = b.position ??         "contents": "/**\n * Kanban Column Component\n * Verwendet die wiederverwendbaren Primitives für saubere Trennung\n * Aktualisiert für HubSpot-Style Deal Cards\n */\nimport { SortableContext, verticalListSortingStrategy } from '@dnd-kit/sortable';\nimport { KanbanColumnContainer, KanbanItem } from './KanbanPrimitives';\nimport HubspotDealCard from './HubspotDealCard';\n\n// Stage Farben Mapping\nconst STAGE_COLORS = {\n  // B2C Pipeline\n  awareness: '#64748B',\n  interest: '#F59E0B',\n  consideration: '#4A90A4',\n  decision: '#6C5CE7',\n  purchase: '#17A2B8',\n  // B2B Pipeline\n  qualification: '#F59E0B',\n  discovery: '#4A90A4',\n  technical_validation: '#6C5CE7',\n  commercial_negotiation: '#8B5CF6',\n  contract_sent: '#10B981',\n  // B2B2C Pipeline\n  partnership_discussion: '#F59E0B',\n  due_diligence: '#4A90A4',\n  pilot_partnership: '#6C5CE7',\n  contract_negotiation: '#8B5CF6',\n  // Common\n  won: '#10B981',\n  lost: '#EF4444',\n  closed_won: '#10B981',\n  closed_lost: '#EF4444',\n  // Default\n  default: '#64748B',\n};\n\nconst getStageColor = (stage) =&gt; {\n  if (stage?.color) return stage.color;\n  if (stage?.stage_type &amp;&amp; STAGE_COLORS[stage.stage_type]) return STAGE_COLORS[stage.stage_type];\n  if (stage?.slug &amp;&amp; STAGE_COLORS[stage.slug]) return STAGE_COLORS[stage.slug];\n  if (stage?.id &amp;&amp; STAGE_COLORS[stage.id]) return STAGE_COLORS[stage.id];\n  return STAGE_COLORS.default;\n};\n\nconst KanbanColumn = ({ \n  stage, \n  deals, \n  onDealPreview,\n  selectedDeals = {},\n  onToggleSelection,\n  onSettingsClick,\n}) =&gt; {\n  // Berechne Gesamtwert der Deals in dieser Stage",

        "contents": "/**\n * Kanban Primitives - Wiederverwendbare Bausteine für das Kanban Board\n * Optimiert für flüssiges Drag &amp; Drop ohne Ruckeln\n */\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { useDroppable } from '@dnd-kit/core';\nimport { useSortable } from '@dnd-kit/sortable';\nimport { CSS } from '@dnd-kit/utilities';\nimport { Box, Paper, Typography, alpha, useTheme, IconButton, Tooltip } from '@mui/material';\nimport { Settings as SettingsIcon } from '@mui/icons-material';\n\n/**\n * KanbanColumnContainer - Droppable Container für eine Stage\n * Kümmert sich nur um Drop-Zone und Basis-Styling\n */\nexport const KanbanColumnContainer = ({ \n  id, \n  title, \n  count, \n  color, \n  children, \n  totalValue,\n  headerContent,\n  emptyContent,\n  onSettingsClick,\n  showSettings = true,\n}) =&gt; {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({\n    id,\n    data: { type: 'column', stageId: id },\n  });\n\n  const activeColor = color || theme.palette.primary.main;\n  const hasChildren = React.Children.count(children) &gt; 0;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Paper\n      ref={setNodeRef}\n      elevation={0}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Kanban Primitives - Wiederverwendbare Bausteine für das Kanban Board",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Optimiert für flüssiges Drag &amp; Drop ohne Ruckeln",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import React from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 5

        "contents": "/**\n * Deal Card Component\n * \"Dumme\" Komponente - nur visuelle Darstellung\n * DnD-Logik wird extern über KanbanItem gesteuert\n */\nimport {\n  Card,\n  CardContent,\n  Typography,\n  Box,\n  Chip,\n  Avatar,\n  Tooltip,\n  LinearProgress,\n  alpha,\n} from '@mui/material';\nimport {\n  CalendarToday as CalendarIcon,\n  Email as EmailIcon,\n  Person as PersonIcon,\n  Business as BusinessIcon,\n  TrendingUp as TrendingUpIcon,\n  DragIndicator as DragIcon,\n} from '@mui/icons-material';\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\n\nconst DealCard = ({ deal, stageColor = '#6C5CE7', onClick }) =&gt; {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  // Format date\n  const formatDate = (dateString) =&gt; {\n    if (!dateString) return null;\n    try {\n      const date = new Date(dateString);\n      const now = new Date();\n      const diffDays = Math.ceil((date - now) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));\n      \n      // Zeige relative Zeit für nahe Daten\n      if (diffDays === 0) return 'Heute';\n      if (diffDays === 1) return 'Morgen';\n      if (diffDays === -1) return 'Gestern';\n      if (diffDays &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; diffDays &lt;= 7) return &#96;In ${diffDays} Tagen&#96;;\n      \n      return date.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {\n        day: '2-digit',\n        month: 'short',\n      });\n    } catch {\n      return null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Get initials from name\n  const getInitials = (name) =&gt; {\n    if (!name) return '?';\n    return name\n      .split(' ')\n      .map((n) =&gt; n[0])\n      .join('')\n      .toUpperCase()\n      .slice(0, 2);\n  };\n\n  // Score-basierte Farbe\n  const getScoreColor = (score) =&gt; {\n    if (score &gt;= 80) return '#10B981'; // Grün\n    if (score &gt;= 60) return '#F59E0B'; // Gelb\n    if (score &gt;= 40) return '#F97316'; // Orange\n    return '#EF4444'; // Rot\n  };\n\n  const handleClick = (e) =&gt; {\n    // Verhindere Navigation während Drag\n    if (e.defaultPrevented) return;\n    \n    if (onClick) {\n      onClick(deal);\n    } else {\n      navigate(&#96;/deals/${deal.id}/show&#96;);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Priorität ermitteln (falls vorhanden)\n  const getPriorityInfo = () =&gt; {\n    const priority = deal.priority || deal.urgency;",

'action.hover' : 'background.paper',\n                  p: 2,\n                  borderRadius: 2,\n                }}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', mb: 2 }}&gt;\n                  &lt;Typography variant=\"subtitle1\" fontWeight={600}&gt;\n                    {stage.name}\n                  &lt;/Typography&gt;\n                  &lt;Chip\n                    label={&#96;€${getStageTotal(stage.id).toLocaleString()}&#96;}\n                    size=\"small\"\n                    color=\"primary\"\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/Box&gt;\n                \n                &lt;Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 1.5 }}&gt;\n                  {getDealsByStage(stage.id).map((deal, index) =&gt; (\n                    &lt;Draggable key={deal.id} draggableId={deal.id} index={index}&gt;\n                      {(provided, snapshot) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;div\n                          ref={provided.innerRef}\n                          {...provided.draggableProps}\n                          {...provided.dragHandleProps}\n                        &gt;\n                          &lt;DealCard\n                            deal={deal}\n                            isDragging={snapshot.isDragging}\n                          /&gt;\n                        &lt;/div&gt;\n                      )}\n                    &lt;/Draggable&gt;\n                  ))}\n                &lt;/Box&gt;\n                \n                {provided.placeholder}\n              &lt;/Paper&gt;\n            )}\n          &lt;/Droppable&gt;\n        ))}",

        "contents": "- Recent Activity feed (last 20 events)\n- Lead Acquisition chart (area chart, 30 days)\n- Lead Sources pie chart\n- Auto-refresh every 60 seconds\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 2. Leads Resource (Full CRUD)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;jsx\n// LeadList requirements:\n- DataGrid with columns: Name, Company, Email, Score (badge), Pipeline (chip), Source, Created, Actions\n- Sidebar filters: Score range, Pipeline, Source, Date range, Tags\n- Bulk actions: Assign to rep, Add tags, Export selected\n- Quick search by name/email/company\n- Score badge with color coding (Cold/Warm/Hot/Very Hot)\n\n// LeadShow requirements:\n- Tabbed layout: Overview | Activity | Deals | Notes\n- Overview tab: Contact card, Company card, Score breakdown, Attribution data\n- Activity tab: Full timeline with event icons and colors\n- Deals tab: Related deals in this pipeline\n- Notes tab: Internal notes with rich text\n\n// LeadEdit requirements:\n- Sections: Contact Info, Company Info, Pipeline Assignment, Acquisition Data, Tags\n- Inline company creation (if new company)\n- Score displayed but not editable (calculated field)\n- Quick actions: Recalculate Score, Sync to HubSpot, Create Deal\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 3. Deals Resource (Kanban + List)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;jsx\n// DealList requirements:\n- Toggle between Kanban and List views\n- Pipeline selector (Research Lab / B2B Lab / Co-Creation)\n- Kanban with drag-drop stage changes\n- Stage columns show total value and deal count\n- Deal cards show: Title, Value, Contact avatar, Close date, Days in stage\n\n// KanbanBoard requirements:\n- Use @hello-pangea/dnd (fork of react-beautiful-dnd)\n- On drop: Call API to update stage, optimistic update\n- Stage columns are sortable (by value, date, etc.)\n- Visual indicator when dragging (placeholder)\n\n// DealShow requirements:\n- Stage stepper showing progress through pipeline\n- Deal info: Value, Contact, Company, Expected close\n- Activity timeline\n- Related samples/orders (if applicable)\n- Notes and tasks\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 4. Lead Scoring Configuration Page\n&#96;&#96;&#96;jsx\n// LeadScoring page requirements:\n- Display all scoring rules organized by category (Demographic/Engagement/Behavior)",

        "contents": "setIsCreateModalOpen(true);\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleCloseCreateModal = useCallback(() =&gt; {\n    setIsCreateModalOpen(false);\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleDealCreated = useCallback(() =&gt; {\n    loadDeals();\n    notify('Deal erfolgreich erstellt', { type: 'success' });\n  }, [loadDeals, notify]);\n\n  // Stage Triggers Modal handlers\n  const handleOpenTriggersModal = useCallback((stage, stageDeals) =&gt; {\n    setTriggersStage(stage);\n    setTriggersDeals(stageDeals);\n    setIsTriggersModalOpen(true);\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleCloseTriggersModal = useCallback(() =&gt; {\n    setIsTriggersModalOpen(false);\n    setTriggersStage(null);\n    setTriggersDeals([]);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Loading state for pipelines\n  if (pipelinesLoading) {\n    return (\n      &lt;Box sx={{ width: '100%', p: 2 }}&gt;\n        &lt;Skeleton variant=\"rectangular\" height={100} sx={{ mb: 2, borderRadius: 2 }} /&gt;\n        &lt;Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2 }}&gt;\n          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i =&gt; (\n            &lt;Skeleton key={i} variant=\"rectangular\" width={320} height={400} sx={{ borderRadius: 2 }} /&gt;\n          ))}\n        &lt;/Box&gt;\n      &lt;/Box&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  const loading = stagesLoading || dealsLoading;\n\n  // Get color for active deal overlay\n  const getStageColor = (stageId) =&gt; {\n    const stage = stages.find(s =&gt; s.id === stageId || s.slug === stageId);\n    if (stage?.color) return stage.color;\n    if (stage?.stage_type &amp;&amp; STAGE_COLORS[stage.stage_type]) {\n      return STAGE_COLORS[stage.stage_type];\n    }\n    if (stage?.slug &amp;&amp; STAGE_COLORS[stage.slug]) {\n      return STAGE_COLORS[stage.slug];\n    }\n    return STAGE_COLORS.default;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Box sx={{ width: '100%', height: 'calc(100vh - 200px)' }}&gt;\n      ",

        "contents": "/**\n * Deal List Component\n * Connects to REAL API (GET /deals)\n * Kanban board implementation included\n */\nimport { useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport {\n  List,\n  Datagrid,\n  TextField,\n  DateField,\n  FunctionField,\n  NumberField,\n  useDataProvider,\n  useRefresh,\n  CreateButton,\n  SearchInput,\n  SelectInput,\n} from 'react-admin';\nimport {\n  Box,\n  Typography,\n  Chip,\n  IconButton,\n  Tooltip,\n  Card,\n  CardContent,\n  ToggleButton,\n  ToggleButtonGroup,\n} from '@mui/material';\nimport {\n  Refresh as RefreshIcon,\n  ViewKanban as KanbanIcon,\n  ViewList as ListIcon,\n  Email as EmailIcon,\n} from '@mui/icons-material';\nimport { KanbanBoard } from '../../components/Kanban';\n\nconst pipelineColorPalette = ['#4A90A4', '#6C5CE7', '#28A745', '#F59E0B', '#17A2B8', '#DC3545'];\nconst stageColorPalette = ['#64748B', '#F59E0B', '#4A90A4', '#6C5CE7', '#17A2B8', '#28A745', '#DC3545'];\n\nconst PipelineChip = ({ pipelineId, pipelineMap }) =&gt; {\n  const pipeline = pipelineMap[pipelineId];\n  const color = pipeline?.color || '#64748B';\n  const label = pipeline?.name || pipelineId || 'Unknown';\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Chip\n      label={label}\n      size=\"small\"\n      sx={{\n        bgcolor: &#96;${color}20&#96;,\n        color: color,\n        fontWeight: 500,\n      }}\n    /&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nconst StageChip = ({ stageId, stageName, stageMap }) =&gt; {\n  const stage = stageMap[stageId];\n  const color = stage?.color || '#64748B';\n  const label = stageName || stage?.name || stageId || 'Unknown';\n\n  return (\n    &lt;Chip\n      label={label}\n      size=\"small\"\n      sx={{\n        bgcolor: &#96;${color}20&#96;,\n        color: color,\n        fontWeight: 500,\n      }}\n    /&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nconst ValueField = ({ value }) =&gt; {\n  if (!value) return &lt;Typography color=\"text.secondary\"&gt;—&lt;/Typography&gt;;\n  \n  return (\n    &lt;Typography variant=\"body2\" fontWeight={600} color=\"primary.main\"&gt;\n      €{value.toLocaleString()}\n    &lt;/Typography&gt;\n  );\n};\n\nconst SequenceChip = ({ sequence }) =&gt; {\n  if (!sequence || sequence.status !== 'active') {\n    ",

            {
              "file": ".\\.specstory\\history\\2026-02-17_11-22Z-вводный-гайд-по-проекту.md",
              "matches": [
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3254,
                  "content": "Wir haben Leads mit Suche, Filtern, Event-Timeline und Scoring. Deals werden im Kanban-Board verwaltet – Drag &amp; Drop, Stages, Won/Lost. Es gibt eine Datenbank mit Kunden und Unternehmen (Organizations). Pipelines sind konfigurierbar, Tasks können Deals und Leads zugeordnet werden. Auth mit Login und 2FA ist aktiv. Moco ist integriert – bei Deal-Won werden Angebote und Rechnungen automatisch synchronisiert. Slack sendet Hot-Lead-Alerts und Sales-Wins."
                }
              ]
            },

              "matches": [
                {
                  "lineNumber": 12,
                  "content": "Главная проблема твоего текущего кода — смешивание логики и отображения. В \"хорошем\" примере компоненты (KanbanBoard, KanbanCard) — это просто глупые обертки, которые занимаются только стилями и DnD, а логика живет отдельно."

                {
                  "lineNumber": 16,
                  "content": "Создадим файл KanbanComponents.js (аналог components/ui/kanban из примера), но на MUI."

                  "lineNumber": 20,
                  "content": "Соберем всё в KanbanBoard.js, упростив логику."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 23,
                  "content": "Создай файл components/KanbanPrimitives.jsx. Это создаст ту самую структуру, которая тебе понравилась во втором проекте."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 33,
                  "content": "export const KanbanColumn = ({ id, title, count, color, children, totalValue }) =&gt; {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 89,

                {

                  "lineNumber": 338,
                  "content": "KanbanPrimitives: Мы изолировали сложную логику useSortable и стили колонок в отдельные файлы. В коде компонента KanbanBoard теперь чистота — видно только структуру."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 340,
                  "content": "CSS.Translate вместо CSS.Transform: В KanbanItem я использовал CSS.Translate.toString(transform). В оригинальной библиотеке Transform меняет и масштаб (scale), что часто вызывает размытие текста и визуальные глюки при перетаскивании. Translate меняет только позицию X/Y, что работает плавнее."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 348,

                  "content": "    \"content\": \"-- =============================================================================\\n-- Add position column to deals for Kanban ordering\\n-- =============================================================================\\n\\nALTER TABLE deals\\n  ADD COLUMN position INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;\\n\\nWITH ranked AS (\\n  SELECT\\n    id,\\n    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\\n      PARTITION BY pipeline_id, stage_id\\n      ORDER BY created_at DESC\\n    ) AS pos\\n  FROM deals\\n)\\nUPDATE deals d\\nSET position = ranked.pos\\nFROM ranked\\nWHERE d.id = ranked.id;\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_deals_pipeline_stage_position ON deals(pipeline_id, stage_id, position);\\n\","

                  "lineNumber": 627,
                  "content": "  \"plan\": \"# DNA ME CRM - Frontend Vervollständigung\\n\\n## Problembeschreibung\\n\\nDas Backend ist zu **95% vollständig implementiert** mit allen Kernfunktionen (Event Ingestion, Scoring, Intent Detection, Smart Routing, Automations, Integrations), aber das Frontend zeigt nur etwa **30% davon**:\\n\\n❌ Settings-Seite: Alle Buttons sind disabled, nur Mock-Daten\\n❌ Team Management: Nur Mock-Daten statt echtem API\\n❌ Integration Settings: Keine UI für API-Status\\n❌ Kanban Board: Nur Placeholder, kein Drag &amp;amp; Drop\\n❌ Automation Management: Komplett fehlend\\n❌ Global Lead Pool View: Keine dedizierte Ansicht\\n❌ Campaign Management: Fehlend\\n\\n## Phase 1: Settings-Seite Vollständig Funktionsfähig Machen\\n\\n### 1.1 Team Management mit echtem API\\n\\n**Betroffen:** [&amp;#96;frontend/src/pages/Settings/index.jsx&amp;#96;](frontend/src/pages/Settings/index.jsx)\\n\\n**Änderungen:**\\n1. **Neue Komponente erstellen:** &amp;#96;frontend/src/pages/Settings/TeamManagement.jsx&amp;#96;\\n   - Vollständige CRUD-Operatione [... omitted end of long line]"

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

Now I understand the setup:

1. **KanbanBoard.jsx** uses `@dnd-kit/core`:
   - `DndContext` with `PointerSensor` (activation after 8px distance)
   - `DragOverlay` renders the dragged deal (HubspotDealCard) when `activeDeal` is set
   - No custom `modifiers` or `dropAnimation` are passed to DndContext or DragOverlay

2. **KanbanPrimitives.jsx** has `KanbanItem` which uses `useSortable` from `@dnd-kit/sortable`. The draggable div gets `attributes` and `listeners` and when dragging the item gets `opacity: 0` (original disappears) while DragOverlay shows the copy.

The offset issue: In @dnd-kit, the **DragOverlay** by default positions the overlay so that the **top-left corner** of the dragged element aligns with the pointer. So when you click in the middle of a card, the overlay's top-left is at the cursor — hence the card appears "offset" (shifted). The fix is to use a **modifier** that applies an offset so the overlay stays under the cursor at the same point where the user clicked.

In dnd-kit you can:
1. Use `DragOverlay` with a custom modifier - but actually DragOverlay doesn't accept a modifier directly in the same way.
2. Check the dnd-kit docs: The overlay position is controlled by the library. You need to use the **snapCenterToCursor** modifier from `@dnd-kit/modifiers` so the center of the overlay snaps to the cursor, OR create a custom modifier that uses the initial cursor offset (where the user clicked on the card) to keep that point under the cursor.

Actually, the standard solution in dnd-kit is the **snapCenterToCursor** modifier - it makes the center of the dragged element follow the cursor instead of the top-left. That often feels more natural for cards.

Let me search for dnd-kit modifiers and DragOverlay offset.
</details></think>

[dnd-kit: drag relative to mouse pointer instead of draggable](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/77803506/dnd-kit-drag-relative-to-mouse-pointer-instead-of-draggable)<br/>3. [Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...](https://github.com/clauderic/dnd-kit/issues/1649)<br/><br/># @dnd-kit DragOverlay Cursor Offset and snapCenterToCursor<br/><br/>## The Problem<br/>By default, when using `DragOverlay` in dnd-kit, the overlay is positioned relative to the original draggable element's top-left corner, creating an offset from the cursor position when you start dragging.[1] This is especially noticeable when the overlay is a different size than the draggable element.<br/><br/>## The Solution: snapCenterToCursor Modifier<br/>The `snapCenterToCursor` modifier was introduced to address this issue.[3] To use it:<br/><br/>1. Install `@dnd-kit/modifiers`<br/>2. Pass the modifier to `DragOverlay`:<br/>```jsx<br/><DragOverlay modifiers=\{[snapCenterToCursor]\}><br/>  <YourDraggableComponentCopy /><br/></DragOverlay><br/>```<br/><br/>3. Optionally, add `collisionDetection=\{pointerWithin\}` to your `DndContext` for better collision detection.[2]<br/><br/>## How It Works<br/>The `snapCenterToCursor` modifier was implemented by exposing the `activatorEvent` to modifiers, allowing them to access cursor position data from mouse and touch events (though keyboard sensors won't have coordinate data).[1][3]<br/><br/>## Related Issues<br/>Some users have reported cursor offset gaps even with the modifier applied, particularly after framework/dependency updates, which may require additional CSS adjustments.[5] |

[Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...](https://github.com/clauderic/dnd-kit/blob/master/packages/modifiers/src/index.ts)<br/><br/># snapCenterToCursor Modifier<br/><br/>`snapCenterToCursor` is a built-in modifier in the `@dnd-kit/modifiers` package that snaps the center of a draggable item to the cursor position when it is picked up.[1] This modifier has no effect when using the Keyboard sensor.[1]<br/><br/>## Usage<br/><br/>You can import and use it with `DndContext` or `DragOverlay`:<br/><br/>```jsx<br/>import \{ snapCenterToCursor \} from '@dnd-kit/modifiers';<br/><br/><DndContext modifiers=\{[snapCenterToCursor]\}><br/>  \{/* ... */\}<br/></DndContext><br/>```<br/><br/>## Background<br/><br/>The `snapCenterToCursor` modifier was introduced as part of a feature that passes the activator event to modifiers, allowing for more precise cursor-based positioning during drag operations.[3] |
